package rulecoverage

func NegativeDynamodbScanInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "dynamodb_scan_in_handler"
    family := "library"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`dynamodb.Scan` in request handler functions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
